basic_settings.title: Basic Settings
basic_settings.use_mileage_description: Enable mileage earning and usage features.
basic_settings.earn_rate_hint: This will be set as default when registering products.

basic_settings.title: Basic Settings
basic_settings.use_charge_description: Allow users to charge deposit through payment methods in My Page.
basic_settings.refund_to_deposit_description: Allow users to choose automatic deposit of refund amount during cancellation/return request.

charge_refund_settings.title: Charge/Refund Settings
charge_refund_settings.description: Configure conditions for customers to charge and refund deposits.
charge_refund_settings.min_charge_hint: Minimum amount that can be charged at once
charge_refund_settings.max_charge_hint: Maximum amount that can be charged at once
charge_refund_settings.charge_bonus_description: Grant bonus deposit based on charge amount.
charge_refund_settings.allow_refund_description: Allow withdrawal (refund) request for deposit balance.
